<img width="85" height="20" alt="68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f62616467652f4a6176615363726970742d3131313832373f7374796c653d666c61742d737175617265266c6f676f3d6a617661736372697074266c6f676f436f6c6f723d463744463145" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f266d440-f365-4466-a0a0-f673f422a9c2" /># 🛠️ Furniture Assembly Service Website

This project is a website for a furniture assembly service. It allows customers to learn about the service, view previous work, and submit requests for furniture assembly.

## About the Project

The website represents **Andrii Ryndia Solutions**, a furniture assembly service.  
It provides information about services, working area, and allows users to contact the specialist directly or via a request form.

## Screenshot

<p align="center">
  <img src="Screens/Andr Ryndia3.png" width="700"/>
</p>

## 🚀 Features

- 📄 Informational sections about the service
- 🧑‍🔧 "About Me" section
- 🗺️ Service area overview
- 🖼️ Gallery of completed work
- 📞 Contact information (Phone, Email, WhatsApp)
- 📝 Contact form to submit assembly requests

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

- **Frontend:**
  - HTML![Uploadin<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="85" height="20" role="img" aria-label="JavaScript"><title>JavaScript</title><g shape-rendering="crispEdges"><rect width="0" height="20" fill="#555"/><rect x="0" width="85" height="20" fill="#111827"/></g><g fill="#fff" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Verdana,Geneva,DejaVu Sans,sans-serif" text-rendering="geometricPrecision" font-size="110"><image x="5" y="3" width="14" height="14" href="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/><text x="515" y="140" transform="scale(.1)" fill="#fff" textLength="570">JavaScript</text></g></svg>g 68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f62616467652f4a6176615363726970742d3131313832373f7374796c653d666c61742d737175617265266c6f676f3d6a617661736372697074266c6f676f436f6c6f723d463744463145.svg…]()

  - CSS
  - JavaScript

- **Backend:**
  - Python (for handling form submissions)
  - Web3Forms

## 📬 Contact

Users can reach out via:

- Phone
- Email
- WhatsApp
- Website contact form
You can find a Site on my Link.
Link: https://saarmontage.de/

The site was updated on April 28, 2026.
